## Human gates

- [ ] Focused change; no unrelated rename/refactor.
- [ ] Tests and mechanical release gates pass.
- [ ] No secrets, personal data or proprietary evidence.
- [ ] Unknown rules remain unresolved for human review.
- [ ] Public claims match `docs/CLAIMS_POLICY.md`.
- [ ] PDF/UA conformance is not asserted.
- [ ] Changelog and relevant documentation updated.
- [ ] Independent reviewer identified for high-risk changes.
